name: TMP
description: Vladof's TMP is a straightforward machine pistol built around steady sustained fire, with low recoil, quick reloads, and a respectable magazine. It is not especially accurate, but it maintains pressure well and can put out strong sustained damage compared with many non-Vladof pistols. Barrel parts adjust the balance between damage, accuracy, and recoil, but the basic identity stays the same.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
